titleStmt.title: SII 34.179: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 179. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the first prākāra of the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Kulōttuṅga I, 40th year, Dhanus, badi 10, Punarvasu, Friday = A.D. 1109, December 10, Friday.

This records that a merchant of Rājarāja-puram in Vaḍa-Koṅgu, who had set up also the image of Tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai-Nāchchiyār purchased land from the sabhā of Kuḻittaṇḍalai in Mīkōṭṭu-nāḍu of Rājamahēndra-vaḷanāḍu and endowed it for feeding dēvaraḍiyār, śivayōgis and tapasvis in the maṭha called Eḻunūṟṟuvaṉ-tirumaḍam near the western gate of Śivapādaśēkhara-puram in Kuṟunāgai-nāḍu. The merchant and his wife conveyed the gift through a local agent.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vīramE tuṇaiyākavum tiyākamE yaṇiyākavum śrīceṅkOloccik karuṅkali kaṭintu pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jeyamātu vi
rumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭicūṭi mīnavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Ēṉai maṉnava ririyaluṟ ṟiḻitara ti
kkakaṉaittun taṉ cakkara naṭātti vijaiyapiṣēkam paṇṇi vīrasimhāsanattu Avaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷōṭu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōrāja
kēcaripanmarāna tribhuvanccakravattikaḷ śrīkulōttuṅkacōḻa devaṟkku Iru
nāṟpatāvatu rājamahēntra vaḷanāṭṭu mīkōṭṭu nāṭṭu brahmadeyaṅ kuḻittaṇṭalai peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm dhanu nāyaṟṟu Aparapa
kṣattu tiyaiyum puṇarpūcamum peṟṟa veḷḷikkiḻamai nāḷ Ivvūr naṭuviṟ tirumuṟṟattu rājēntira cōḻaṉ tirumaṇṭapattēy dharmmiceytu kūṭṭak kuṟai
vaṟakkūṭi Iruntu Iṉnāṭṭu kuṟunākai nāṭṭu civapāta cēkarapurattu mēlai vācalukku teṟkil Eḻunūṟṟu viḷākattilē devaraṭiyār civayōgikaḷukku
m tapasyarkkum Amutu ceykaikku vaṭakkiṟ koṅkil rājarājapurattu Irukkum viyāpāri cirikōlamāṇi tēnaiṅkakkuc camaintu Ittaṉmañ ceyvitta tiruvāṉpōkkimalai mahādevaṟkku tiru
ppaḷḷiyaṟai nampirāṭṭiyārai Eḻuntaruḷivitta marutāntakapuramuṭaiyāṉ nāṭaṟi pukaḻaṉ tāmōtiranāna piḷḷaik
kaṭiyāṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilavilaiyāvaṇam Eṅkaḷūr
nilattu tirunārāyaṇavatikkuk kiḻakku Ayyaṉ vāykkālukkut teṟku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu
mutaṟ catirattuṇṭattuk kaviṇiyaṉ mātēvaṉ Araṅkaṉ nilattukkut teṉmēṟkaṭaiyat tiruvulakaḷanta taruḷinapaṭi nilam 1/4 Iṉnilam kālum viṟṟukkuṭuttu koḷvatāka Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu
2 Iraṇṭu Ikkācu Iraṇṭum Iṉ nilattukkuc cantirātittavaṟ nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyiṟukkak kaṭavOmāka Iṟaikāvalākak koṇṭa kācu
patiṉmūṉṟum Ākak kācu 10 5 Ikkācu patinañcum Ittēvaraṭi caṇḍeśvara devar śrīhastattālkoṇṭu Iṉ nilaṅkālum viṟṟukkuṭuttōm peru
ṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyōm Iṉnilattukku Ituvē vilaiyātākavum Ikkācukku Ituvē porumāvaṟutip poruṭcilavōlai yāvatākavum Ituvallatu vēṟu
poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcilavōlai kāṭṭak kaṭavatallātatākavu mipparicaintu Ikkācu patiṉaiñcum koṇṭu Iṉṉilam kālum Eḻunūṟṟuvaṉ
Amutu ceykaikku kōlamāṇi tēṉnaṅkaikkum kōlamāṇicuṟṟiy tēvikkum camaintu Idharmmam
yārkku vilaikkuṟaviṟṟu poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟavilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttōm peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm Iṉṉilam Iv paṭiyē I
cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷappeṟuvārāka kāśyapaṉ brahmaṇyatēvar mātavaṉār paṇiyālum kavaṇiyaṉ nārāyaṇanār paṇiyālum vākkiyaṉ kēcuvaṉ nārāyaṇa
piranār paṇiyālum vārkkiyaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇa nārāyaṇanār paṇiyālum kāśyapaṉ cō
nārāyaṇanār paṇiyālum paṇippaṇiyāṟpaṇi kēṭṭu nilavilai piramāṇam Eḻutiṉēṉ Ivūr madhyastaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ tiricciṟṟampala muṭaiyānēṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu traṉ tāmōtiranāna piḷḷaikkaṭiyānēṉ I
nmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
